overview.description: Condition file test: remove file only if condition is true, verify other files in bucket remain unchanged if condition is false
overview.name: S3 Condition File scenario

bucket.comment: Check ability to create new bucket testlum-cond-file-bucket

file.comment: Check ability to upload upload_1.json, targeted for conditional removal
Check ability to upload upload_2.json, expected to remain after condition check

s3.comment: Step 3 - verify upload_1.json upload via file comparison

file.comment: Check that downloaded upload_1.json matches expected_1.json

s3.comment: Step 3b - verify upload_2.json upload via file comparison

file.comment: Check that downloaded upload_2.json matches expected_2.json

condition.comment: Step 4 - create condition that evaluates to true, file removal must execute
condition.name: removeFile

s3.comment: Step 5 - remove upload_1.json only if removeFile condition is true - must execute

file.comment: Check that upload_1.json is removed when condition is true

condition.comment: Step 4b - create condition that evaluates to false, file removal must be skipped
condition.name: keepFile

s3.comment: Step 5b - remove upload_2.json only if keepFile condition is true - must be skipped

file.comment: Check that upload_2.json is not removed when condition is false

s3.comment: Step 6 - verify upload_2.json still exists and content is unchanged after skipped removal

file.comment: Check that upload_2.json remains unchanged in bucket after condition false

s3.comment: Step 6b - verify upload_2.json content via inline value as additional assertion

file.comment: Check upload_2.json content matches inline value after skipped removal
